description_long: This is a small, ornamental tree with a spherical canopy densely packed with bright green, broad leaves and numerous round, red fruits resembling apples. The foliage is lush and covers most of the canopy, with only a few small gaps revealing the interior. The trunk is slender, straight, and dark brown, supporting the weight of the leafy crown above. The leaves are simple and arranged in a somewhat alternate pattern, giving the tree a full, bushy appearance. The red fruits are distributed evenly throughout the canopy, adding vibrant color contrast against the green leaves. This tree would be well-suited for urban parks, sidewalks, or residential gardens as a decorative feature.
description: A small ornamental tree with a dense, spherical canopy of bright green leaves and numerous red, apple-like fruits. It features a slender, dark brown trunk and a lush, vibrant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing a nearly symmetrical, round canopy with prominent red fruits and dense green leaves, trunk centered.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fullness of the canopy and the even distribution of red fruits among the leaves.
description_view_2: Rear view with slightly more visible gaps in the foliage, revealing the interior structure and fruit placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with dense leaves and red fruits, trunk slightly off-center.
